meta.source: SI (Databento bbo-1m real, 2016-01-04…2024-12-31, 3194078 bars) + YM (SMT partner, cross-asset metals↔equities)

variants.be_50: MFE>=50% TP-dist arms BE; bar touching entry exits flat
variants.tp1_be: MFE>=50% closes half at +50% TP-dist AND moves stop to BE on remainder

smt.true: YM took its target during release→sweep_deadline (SI short → YM low<pre_low; SI long → YM high>pre_high)
